Descendant of the Captain Marvel lineage, Phyla-Vell uses her Kree and artificially created Eternal physiology to protect the cosmos. While fighting the Phalanx, Phyla became the Avatar of Death to save her romantic partner Moondragon, gaining new abilities and her new title: Martyr. 

Shatterstar

title: Titan Rush: Survival
notes:
【New Content】
1. Alliance announcements can now include coordinates.
【Bugs & Optimizations】
1. Fixed and optimized some known issues in Peak Duel.
2. Fixed an issue where the activation time of nameplates redeemed in the GIFT CERTIFICATE SHOP did not match the actual activation time.
3. Fixed an issue where gift entries in the World channel would repeat when scrolling up to refresh.
4. Fixed an issue where chat golden eggs and gift bubbles could not be closed and kept displaying.

title: Toy Blast
notes:
Update of Ages!

What happens when Rhino travels thousands of years into the past? A world of caves, stone tools, and friendly cave people is waiting to be explored! Join this timeless adventure in our latest update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!
